title: Kurt Cobain`s Guitar
description: This resource pack changes the changed hook to a black guitar.
body:
### This resource pack modifies the usual black guitar hook. The guitar shown in the resource pack is similar to the one used by famous musician **Kurt Cobain**. He was the leader of **Nirvana.**
![guitar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/voPpwbnd/images/2a1d43809a4754ec76d0507744cbeb1d4bcadbfb.png)
